title: diospyros ferruginescens var. ferruginescens
intro: Diospyros ferruginescens var. ferruginescens, also known as the 'Ferrugineous Persimmon' or 'Ferrugineous Date Plum', is a plant species within the family Ebenaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Diospyros ferruginescens var. ferruginescens include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Diospyros ferruginescens var. ferruginescens is commonly used in traditional herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications.
